name: subvocal
description: Tensor-native local coding agent: in-process GGUF inference (CPU + GPU) with AST-aware preprocessing, logit-level steering, speculative decoding, and dual-brain orchestration.
author: Lorenzo Luca Perrone

scripts.build: npm run build:synapse && npm run build:encode
scripts.test: npm run test -w encode && npm run test -w synapse
